product_overview: GeoContent Core is a white-label geolocation and gamification engine that delivers contextual multimedia content based on user location and provides admin tooling, analytics, and AI-assisted content generation. It supports administrator configuration, executive reporting, and AI-driven quiz/route creation to accelerate content production.
core_goals: Deliver precise location-triggered multimedia experiences (audio, video, images, text) using geofencing.
Provide a gamification engine (stamps, XP, levels) to increase user engagement and retention.
Offer admin controls for municipalities to manage plans, themes, and global settings securely.
Offer analytics and exportable executive reports for impact measurement and stakeholder reporting.
Expose AI-driven endpoints to generate POI quizzes, route breakdowns from PDFs, and final route quizzes.
Enforce data validation and role-based access control; ensure API stability and PDF processing resilience.

features.name: Admin Municipality Settings
features.description: Create and update municipality-level configuration including branding, theme, plan tier and admin master password.
user_flows: POST /api/admin/municipality with { id, name, logoUrl, themeId, adminMasterPassword, planTier, extraRoutesCount } -> Receive 200 { success: true }
POST /api/admin/municipality with missing required field (e.g., planTier) -> Receive 500 { success: false, error: string }

features.name: Analytics and Executive Reports
features.description: Fetch aggregated dashboard statistics and generate PDF executive reports for administrators.
user_flows: GET /api/analytics/executive-report -> Receive 200 { success: true, data: { userMetrics, completions, heatmapTelemetry } }
GET /api/analytics/executive-report when query parameters or data aggregation fail -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: string }
GET /api/analytics/executive-report when server/data store error occurs -> Receive 500 { success: false, error: string }

features.name: AI Content Generation
features.description: Generate 3-option POI quizzes, full route breakdowns from PDFs, and final route quizzes using OpenRouter/AI services.
user_flows: POST /api/ai/generate-quiz with { poiText, optionsCount: 3 } -> Receive 200 { success: true, quiz: { question, options, correctIndex } }
POST /api/ai/generate-quiz with malformed body -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: string }
POST /api/ai/generate-route with { pdfFile (binary), routeId } -> Receive 200 { success: true, routeBreakdown: { pois, segments, durations } }
POST /api/ai/generate-route with very large PDF (exceeds processing time) -> Receive 500 or 504 indicating timeout or processing failure
POST /api/ai/generate-route-quiz with { routeId, routeSummary } -> Receive 200 { success: true, finalQuiz: { questions, scoring } }
POST /api/ai/generate-route-quiz with missing routeSummary -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: string }

features.name: Geolocation & Geofencing
features.description: Detect user proximity to POIs and unlock contextualized content when geofence conditions are met.
user_flows: POST /api/geofence/enter with { userId, poiId, coords: { lat, lon }, timestamp } -> Receive 200 { success: true, unlockedContentId } -> GET /api/content/{unlockedContentId} -> Receive 200 { content: { type, url, metadata } }
POST /api/geofence/enter with invalid coordinates or out-of-range distance -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: 'out_of_range' }

features.name: Gamification Engine (Stamps, XP, Levels)
features.description: Award stamps, compute XP and levels as users complete POIs and routes; expose user progress and leaderboards.
user_flows: POST /api/gamification/stamp with { userId, poiId, timestamp } -> Receive 200 { success: true, newStampId, xpAwarded } -> GET /api/gamification/profile?userId={userId} -> Receive 200 { xp, level, stamps }
POST /api/gamification/stamp with duplicate stamp submission -> Receive 409 { success: false, error: 'duplicate_stamp' }

features.name: Multimedia Content Delivery
features.description: Serve audio, video, images and text assets tied to POIs with support for caching and offline PWA access.
user_flows: GET /api/content/{contentId} for non-existent contentId -> Receive 404 { success: false, error: 'not_found' }

features.name: Admin Dashboard - Routes & POI Management
features.description: Admin interfaces and APIs to create and manage routes, POIs, themes and municipality-level settings via CRUD endpoints.
user_flows: POST /api/admin/route with { municipalityId, name, pois: [...] } -> Receive 201 { success: true, routeId }
POST /api/admin/route with invalid POI schema -> Receive 400 { success: false, error: string }

features.name: Admin Municipality Settings
features.description: Update municipality configurations such as plan tiers and passwords.

endpoints.description: Save municipality global settings, themes, and limits

features.name: Analytics and Executive Reports
features.description: Fetch dashboard stats and generate PDF executive reports

endpoints.description: Fetch analytical data including user metrics, completions, and heatmap telemetry

features.name: AI Content Generation
features.description: Generate POI Quizzes, Final Route Quizzes, and full routes from PDFs using OpenRouter

endpoints.description: Generate a 3-option quiz for a single POI
Generate a full route breakdown parsing a provided PDF file
Generate the final transversal challenge quiz for a route

known_limitations.issue: AI routes might timeout if parsing large PDFs due to Vercel's 60s boundary
known_limitations.impact: Potential 504 Gateway Timeout or 500 error when processing very long PDFs
